data.content:
Both builds succeeded with 0 warnings and 0 errors. Two binlog files were created:

- **`debug.binlog`** — Debug configuration build
- **`release.binlog`** — Release configuration build

You can analyze them with `dotnet build -getResultOutputFile` or tools like the [MSBuild Structured Log Viewer](https://msbuildlog.com/).
